notes: [a]_R = {x in A : (a,x) in R} for an equivalence relation R (def:equivalence-relation). REDUNDANCY NOTE: def:relation is subsumed by def:equivalence-relation (an equivalence relation IS a relation; the (a,x) in R membership is carried by it), so def:relation is a prunable redundant edge -- kept (not wrong) but flagged for the reviewer.
